summary: Completed major EVOL plugin enhancements v0.5.2→v0.6.0: DNA icon, per-profile active toggle, rich markdown phase tools, chat badge+status page, configurable trigger thresholds, circuit files for 11 agent profiles, bug fixes (memorize None handling, _log_cycle_result import, items return), .github infrastructure created. Analyst confirmed sync. Coder bumped version. Reviewer audited — PASS after creating researcher+default circuit files.

Distributed Falke Identity adaptation: Created IDENTITY.md for 10 non-conductor agent profiles. Enriched SOUL/AGENTS/MEMORY with Falke core identity, doctrine, gates, and organism memory. Created agent.yaml and prompts/ for agent0, default, researcher. All 11 profiles now share Falke identity as distributed aspects. Reviewer audit: PASS (8/8 checks).

Fixed EVOL bottom bar visibility: created proper JavaScript extension (initFw_end/evol-bottom-bar.js) that injects 🧬 EVOL button into .chat-bottom-actions-bar with manual phase trigger popover. Popover sends slash commands via Alpine chatInput store for visible results. Cleaned up broken HTML files (bottom-bar.html, chat-input-bottom-actions-end.html). Bump to 0.7.1.

Phase 1: Removed all legacy circuit file dependencies (SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, IDENTITY.md) from EVOL plugin. Replaced circuit_files/health with identity_files/health sourced from agent.yaml (YAML parsed) and prompts/agent.system.main.specifics.md. Updated config.py (IdentityWeight, get_identity_path), engine.py (all keys), registry.py (absorb reads agent.yaml+prompts, reflect/memorize updated, _apply_identity_edit logs to evol/identity_log.jsonl, _increment_counter uses evol/counters.json), tools/, tests/, configs/, knowledge.py (promote_to_identity, manage_knowledge_capacity), commands.py. Set per_agent_config: false. Deleted SOUL/AGENTS/MEMORY/IDENTITY.md from 10 agent profiles. Reviewer adversarial audit PASS (zero old refs, absorb returns identity_files from agent.yaml/specifics.md on conductor+coder).
